title: putoria brevifolia var. typica
intro: Putoria brevifolia var. typica is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae, commonly known as the lesser mayapple or puttoria. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, exhibiting antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Putoria brevifolia var. typica are believed to provide relief from pain, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as support digestive health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to address various health concerns.
